hero.title: Learn faster
hero.subtitle: Summaries, past exams, course notes — every shared document helps the next class succeed.

popular.title: Popular documents
popular.empty: Be the first to drop a doc — your class will thank you.

leaderboard.title: Top contributors
leaderboard.empty: The podium is wide open. Claim it.

delegates.title: Delegates
delegates.empty: No delegate in your section yet? Let us know.

news.title: What's new at ISFCE
news.empty: Nothing new right now — check back soon.

community.title: Community
community.discordRoles: Create an account on the site to get the Verified role on Discord and access course discussions. Other roles are granted based on your XP.
community.discordRolesShort: Discord roles linked to your XP

ad.disclaimer: Ad — support Freenote to hide these.
ad.loginHint: Log in so your donation disables ads.

document.title: Title
document.author: Author
document.noResults: No documents found — try different keywords.

docs.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this document and its file? This cannot be undone.

sections.title: Sections
sections.name: Name
sections.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and {{count}} linked document(s)? Files will be permanently lost.

courses.title: Courses
courses.name: Name
courses.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and {{count}} linked document(s)? Files will be permanently lost.

delegates.title: Delegate Management
delegates.userSearchPlaceholder: Type the first letters of the username…

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete the account of "{{username}}"? Their documents will stay online but displayed as "Anonymous". This cannot be undone.

donations.title: Donations & ad-free
donations.grantHelp: Use this if a Ko-fi donation didn't match an account, or to gift an ad-free period. The duration is added on top of any existing active period.

upload.title: Share a document
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop a PDF here or click to pick one
upload.compressSuggestion: Your PDF is larger than 5 MB — consider compressing it (e.g. ilovepdf.com/compress_pdf) before uploading to save bandwidth.
upload.success: Doc shared — thanks for your class!
upload.successMessage: Your document is live! It will be reviewed by a moderator within 24-48h. You'll earn XP and badges after approval.
upload.pdfOnly: PDFs only for now — convert and try again.
upload.tagsHelper: Separate tags with commas (e.g. java, algo, s3)
upload.anonymousHelp: Hide your username on the document page — other students will see "Anonymous" as the author. You still earn XP, badges and contributions on your profile.
upload.aiGeneratedHelp: Check if the content was written or heavily generated by an AI (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.). An "AI" badge will be shown on the document.

profile.title: My profile
profile.deleteConfirm: This is permanent. Your docs stay online, your account doesn't. Confirm?
profile.publicHelp: Makes your profile page visible to other signed-in users.
profile.carouselHelp: Shows your avatar in the community carousel on the home page.
profile.carouselLocked: Verified users only. Verify your @isfce.be email to unlock.
profile.dangerZoneHelp: This is permanent. Your docs stay online but will be shown as "Anonymous".
profile.noFavorites: You haven't favorited any document yet.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.help: Pick how your avatar is shown. No upload — either your username letter or a generated avatar.

profile.identityHelp: Optional. Your username stays your identifier; these fields only drive the displayed label.
profile.displayRealNameHelp: When enabled, others see "First Last" instead of your username.

linkedAccounts.title: Linked accounts
linkedAccounts.help: Link multiple providers to your account so you can sign in with any of them.
linkedAccounts.cannotUnlinkLast: You cannot unlink your only sign-in method

auth.verifyEmailMessage: Verify your @isfce.be email to unlock this feature.
auth.loginRequired: Log in to access this content

recent.title: Keep reading
recent.empty: Open a document and it will show up here next time.

common.error: Something went wrong — try again in a moment.

footer.independent: Independent project, not affiliated with ISFCE.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ by an ISFCE student.

terms.gateSubtitle: To use Freenote, you must accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Take a moment to read them.
terms.copyrightWarning: Documents shared on Freenote are strictly reserved for ISFCE students. Any redistribution on other platforms, social media or public websites is strictly forbidden. Violating this rule will result in immediate account suspension.
terms.gateCheckbox: I have read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

jwt.help: Paste a JSON Web Token below. Everything stays in your browser — the token is never sent to the server.
jwt.signatureNote: The signature is not verified in the browser (it would require the issuer's public key).
jwt.invalidFormat: A valid JWT has three segments separated by dots.
jwt.invalidContent: One of the segments could not be decoded as JSON.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page doesn't exist or has been moved.
